name: snapshot
description: Capture the current app snapshot from a connected brna runtime.

options.name: --format
options.description: Select markdown, JSON, or YAML output.

options.name: --diff
options.description: Compare against the rolling session baseline.

options.name: --active-layer
options.description: Print only active modal, sheet, popover, toast, or overlay nodes in markdown output.

options.name: --metro
options.description: Metro base URL. Defaults to http://localhost:8081.

options.name: --timeout
options.description: Request timeout in milliseconds.

options.name: --device
options.description: Target a connected runtime device id.

name: act
description: Resolve a selector against a fresh snapshot and dispatch one runtime action.

options.name: --duration
options.description: Long-press duration in milliseconds.

options.name: --direction
options.description: Scroll direction: up, down, left, or right.

options.name: --by
options.description: Scroll distance for scroll actions.

options.name: --metro
options.description: Metro base URL. Defaults to http://localhost:8081.

options.name: --timeout
options.description: Request timeout in milliseconds.

options.name: --device
options.description: Target a connected runtime device id.

name: doctor
description: Check Metro/runtime connectivity and project configuration, with optional safe fixes.

options.name: --fix
options.description: Apply safe Expo, Babel, and Metro configuration fixes after confirmation.

options.name: --metro
options.description: Metro base URL. Defaults to http://localhost:8081.

options.name: --timeout
options.description: Request timeout in milliseconds.

name: verify
description: Validate a snapshot file against the brna schema.

options.name: --format
options.description: Input format. Defaults to the file extension when possible.

name: devices
description: List brna runtimes connected through the Metro bridge.

options.name: --json
options.description: Print the connected devices payload as JSON.

options.name: --metro
options.description: Metro base URL. Defaults to http://localhost:8081.

options.name: --timeout
options.description: Request timeout in milliseconds.

name: mcp
description: Start the brna Model Context Protocol server on stdio.

options.name: --metro
options.description: Metro base URL. Defaults to http://localhost:8081.

options.name: --device
options.description: Target a connected runtime device id.

name: config
description: Manage local brna CLI configuration such as redaction rules.

name: trace
description: Record snapshot and action events for an agent session.
